headline: The Stock Market Is More Expensive Than It Looks. Tread Carefully.
summary: FEATURES - MAIN  Parents of teenagers demanding driving lessons will quickly reacquaint themselves with what some car manufacturers call the passenger-side assist grip. The more popular name has three words starting with “oh” and ending with “handle,” with an s-word in the middle that shan’t be employed here.

headline: What markets have learned since Trump's Liberation Day tariffs
summary: This week marks exactly one year since President Trump enacted his "Liberation Day" tariffs last April 2 as the administration took aim at US trading partners and other countries around the world.Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland sits down with Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer, Interactive Brokers chief strategist Steve Sosnick, and StockBrokers.com director of investor research Jessica Inskip to look back on the market's (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) reaction to US trade tariff policies and what Wall Street has learned since then.

headline: Cloud AI Update - Hidden Costs Surge In Global Enterprise AI Operations
summary: Dan Herbatschek, CEO of Ramsey Theory Group, emphasizes a significant surge in enterprise AI operational costs, which are being underestimated by organizations globally by 30% or more. The costs associated with scaling AI infrastructure are highlighted as a hidden crisis, with enterprises often basing their budgets on pilot projects rather than the extensive demands of full production. Key challenges include the shift from initial model development costs to the ongoing expenses of running AI...

headline: Apple At 50 Weighs AI Partnerships Satellite Ties And Succession
summary: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) marks its 50th anniversary as investors focus on CEO Tim Cook's eventual succession and the company's long term direction. Apple plans to open Siri to third party AI assistants on iOS, signaling a shift toward a more open approach to digital assistants. Amazon is reported to be in talks to acquire Globalstar, Apple's satellite partner for emergency and connectivity features. Apple enters this milestone moment with a current share price of $255.92 and multi year returns...
